ops.title: Fail loudly when cc-notes degrades a task to backlog
ops.body: ccnotes.CreateTask rejects (returns an error) when cc-notes reports TaskCreated.Degraded — i.e. the task silently landed on the backlog instead of the requested branch. cc-orchestrate always passes an explicit workstream branch, so a degraded landing means the workstream→branch binding was not honored; accepting it would hide the constraint violation. Landed with the cc-interact v0.7.0 / cc-notes v0.31.1 migration (commit 6fa1477).
